questions.question: TaskFlow DAG migration к 3.x — главный change в imports?

options.text: from airflow.decorators import dag, task → from airflow.sdk import dag, task. Plus from airflow.models import Variable → from airflow.sdk import Variable. Ruff AIR301 auto-fix

questions.explanation: Главное изменение — airflow.sdk namespace (AIP-72 Task SDK). Старый airflow.decorators / airflow.models — deprecated в 3.x. Auto-fix через ruff AIR301. Тоже Variable, Connection — `from airflow.sdk import Variable`. Под капотом Task SDK делает REST API call к Airflow API server вместо direct DB query. Application-level — same syntax, different transport.

questions.question: Datasets → Assets в 3.x — что меняется?

options.text: from airflow import Dataset → from airflow.sdk import asset (lowercase — function/decorator, не class). schedule=[dataset1, dataset2] → schedule=AssetAny(asset1, asset2) для explicit semantics. Asset events first-class с metadata facets. Multi-asset triggers улучшены. Auto-fix partial — basic cases

questions.explanation: Datasets → Assets — semantic rename (AIP-74/75). `from airflow.sdk import asset` (lowercase function). Improvements: AssetAny / AssetAll / AssetAnyEvent / AssetExpression — explicit multi-asset semantics (previously implicit ALL). Asset events first-class — facets, lineage. Migration: ruff handles basic rename. Advanced patterns (custom dataset URI schemes) may need manual review. Concept identical — same data-aware scheduling.

questions.question: SLA в 3.x removed (AIP-89) — что использовать вместо?

options.text: Listener API duration monitoring + external alerting (Prometheus rules, Datadog monitors на task duration metrics). Configure thresholds в plugin или external system, alert когда duration > threshold. Often лучше — centralized rules не embedded в DAG code

questions.explanation: SLA removed because (a) implementation было quirky (sla_miss_callback не reliable), (b) better via observability tooling. Replacements: (1) Listener API hookimpl on_task_instance_completed — measure duration, compare к threshold, alert; (2) External monitoring rules — Prometheus/Datadog уже track task duration metrics, define alert rules там; (3) Custom Airflow callback (on_failure_callback с timeout check). External often лучше — single source of truth для все DAGs, not embedded.

questions.question: Custom XCom backend (S3XComBackend) требует rewrite для 3.x compatibility.
questions.explanation: Custom XCom backend API stable между 2.x и 3.x. BaseXCom interface (serialize_value, deserialize_value) — same. Capstone S3XComBackend works в 3.x без changes. Configuration через airflow.cfg [core] xcom_backend — identical. Migration к 3.x preserves XCom abstraction. Это intentional — Airflow APIs designed для backward compat в most cases. Major changes (Task SDK, FastAPI) — infrastructure level, не affect user-facing APIs typically.
